policies.qual:
((user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM businesses b
  WHERE ((b.id = employees.business_id) AND (b.created_by = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid))))))

(order_id IN ( SELECT orders.id
   FROM orders
  WHERE (orders.business_id IN ( SELECT get_user_business_ids() AS get_user_business_ids))))

(order_id IN ( SELECT orders.id
   FROM orders
  WHERE (orders.business_id IN ( SELECT get_user_business_ids.business_id
           FROM get_user_business_ids() get_user_business_ids(business_id)))))

policies.qual:
(sale_id IN ( SELECT sales.id
   FROM sales
  WHERE ((sales.user_id = auth.uid()) OR (sales.business_id IN ( SELECT businesses.id
           FROM businesses
          WHERE (businesses.created_by = auth.uid()))) OR (sales.business_id IN ( SELECT employees.business_id
           FROM employees
          WHERE ((employees.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (employees.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'employee'::text, 'cashier'::text])) AND (employees.is_active = true)))))))
policies.with_check:
(sale_id IN ( SELECT sales.id
   FROM sales
  WHERE ((sales.user_id = auth.uid()) OR (sales.business_id IN ( SELECT businesses.id
           FROM businesses
          WHERE (businesses.created_by = auth.uid()))) OR (sales.business_id IN ( SELECT employees.business_id
           FROM employees
          WHERE ((employees.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (employees.is_active = true)))))))
